_comment: AUDIT-SANDBOXED knip config. Scoped to the src/*.cts TypeScript source of truth (83 files). NEVER targets the gitignored compiled gsd-core/bin/lib/*.cjs (ADR-457 build-at-publish) — analyzing build output produces false bloat. NOT wired into the package devDeps/CI. Run from repo root: npx -y knip --config docs/audit/instrumentation/knip.json
